title: SecondBrain Fold Interchange Line
description: One NDJSON line of the SecondBrain fold's governed interchange (ledger row P520, docs/architecture.md ADR-006, execution-plan.md section 9 row P520 'Bring SecondBrain interchange, validation, and governing graph schema under successor source authority'). Two kinds share this one envelope: a mid-fold `batch` line (a bounded set of graph verdicts) and the terminal `summary` line (the fold's committed totals). This contract deliberately stays a single open envelope — the successor's minimal schema-validator subset has no `oneOf`/`if`-`then` (memory-item.contract.json precedent) — so it cannot express 'verdicts is required only when kind=batch' or 'summary is required only when kind=summary'; `src/memory/second-brain-validate.ts` is the layer-conditional enforcement point this schema alone cannot express. In-tree, versioned, and independent of the out-of-repo SecondBrain fold engine (math-KG-excluded; no engine source was read or depended on to write this contract). Runtime-neutral.

kind.description: Discriminator. src/memory/second-brain-validate.ts dispatches on this field and rejects a batch-shaped line carrying `summary`, or a summary-shaped line carrying `verdicts`/`batchIndex`.

sessionId.description: The fold session this line belongs to.

batchIndex.description: kind=batch only: this batch's zero-based position within the fold.

verdicts.description: kind=batch only: the bounded set of graph verdicts this batch carries. May be empty (a batch may legitimately resolve zero verdicts).

graphRef.description: Pointer to the second-brain-graph.contract.json document this summary commits.

summary.description: kind=summary only: the fold's committed totals for the referenced governing graph document.

totalBatches.description: kind=summary only: total number of batch lines that preceded this summary.
